sessions.intent: Design LLM module: C# type definition + PLang goal implementation

before.assumptions: Pieces 1-6 done. Runtime1 LLM module is OpenAI-shaped, no tool support. Builder uses two-pass LLM approach. HTTP module available for PLang goals.

sessions.plan: Thin C# action (query.cs, LlmMessage.cs) defines parameters for builder/source generator. Run() calls PLang goal. Provider = setting pointing to goal name (default: OpenAi). Tools are GoalCalls with Description. Tool execution loop in PLang. Future: migrate to pure PLang via define step.

after.health: Design approved by Ingi. Ready for implementation.
after.notes: Key decisions: no ILlmProvider C# interface, provider is a goal setting, tools are GoalCalls, GoalCall gets Description. Future: define step enables pure PLang modules (separate workstream).
